title: Pork Belly Crumble
description: A sweet and savory dish that combines the tender pork belly with a crunchy crumble topping.
instructions: Season the pork belly with salt and black pepper.
Place the pork belly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 30 minutes.
While the pork is baking, mix together the breadcrumbs, granulated sugar, flour, and cold butter in a bowl until crumbly.
Remove the pork from the oven and brush with brown sugar.
Top the pork with the crumb mixture and return to the oven for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
